raw_text: I bought a mercely's icecream in blinkit and when it arrived the packet cover was broken and I did the feedback with photos and videos of it and they said they can't do a replacement for the product or do a proper refund they told they can only give a coupon of the price of icecream which can be used for a limited time. and whatever number of products we buy they don't give us any carry bags or anything they just hand every products to our bare hands.Worst ordering app I have ever used

Repeatedly receiving damaged items from Blinkit. This time, three bananas arrived split open and exposed. The chatbot was useless—it just asked me to email support and closed the chat. It's frustrating to keep wasting time over problems that shouldn't happen in the first place. Poor quality control and poor customer service. Very disappointing.

I am a Blinkit customer and had ordered a product (Ant Esports GM40 RGB Optical Wired Gaming Mouse) from the platform. Due to a technical issue on your end, my online transaction got stuck in the processing stage, and I was given a date of July 14, 2026. Today is July 14, yet I have not received the refund, and the order history is no longer visible on the Blinkit platform. My point is that when we place an order on Blinkit and an issue arises on your side, the customer is forced to send emails

Blinkit is a truly reliable and easy to use UI and has variety of products. The reason why I gave 4 stars is because of backdoor scalping happening in the designated store near me i really hate this, just recently I checked the hotwheels section and there were several premium hotwheels mentioned coming soon or live by 10 pm but within 1 or 2 hrs they were out of stock, they never went live.

I'm very disappointed with my experience using Blinkit. I accidentally forgot to apply a coupon and immediately requested that my order be cancelled. I paid ₹279, but I received only ₹259 as a refund without any proper explanation. This kind of unfair deduction is unacceptable and shows poor customer service. The refund policy should be fair and transparent, especially when a cancellation is requested immediately after placing an order. Based on my personal experience, I would not recommend it.

very nice app, but I don't get the logic behind adding extra handling charges when the order is 1500rs+ . I have to add a lot of products to 'unlock' free delivery, even when the blink it store near me is just 1.3km near me. I hope they look into the matter.

it's good but once I order a lamp and i had do ne online payment firstly they show that your order is placed but later it was like due to some issue we were not able to place your order but from my end payment was done so they were be like you will get your refund in two to three days but it's been more than a month I haven't received my payment

I forgot to apply bank offer so immediately tried to cancel the order worth520 but there is no refund option or add the money to blinkit wallet just like zepto, Swiggy, Bigbasket.. instead refund as a coupon is available, to use the coupon money.. I have to place another order worth same as coupon amount or more and cannot use the bank offer... not giving any options for customer... forceful extortion of customer money

Blinkit delivered 200 gms rusk instead of 250. It was extremely difficult to raise concern (seems deliberate). After multiple image and video uploads, got replacement scheduled (spent hour) and again 200 gms was delivered which I didn't accept. Surprisingly return was marked as completed. This is cheating and unfair trade practice. It is supposed to be quick commerce and we have to wait hours for. Very limited option to chat

Blinkit was the first grocery app I used and it was good too. Good offers,good quality and quick delivery. But then there are competetor app which are giving good stuff with little better offers so I personally use blinkit and zepto alot. Also please broaden the delivery areas so that we can order from remote areas also. Thankyou for good experience and keep giving good prices and fine quality products.

worst customer support ever. I almost lost my job just because of blinkit. your customer support is so annoying where they keep asking the same questions for almost an hour and then start the same thing again. I had ordered a boat headset where I found out the item was defective as the mic was not working. after a war with the executives somehow returned the item only for a refund option and i needed the same headset so i ordered it again on blinkit. Now I have received the item which I returned

One of the worst customer experience, I ever had. Every time something or the other item is missing/damaged or rotten. In my last order my whole package of 1600 was not delivered. They provide win win points but whenever one tried to get it or redeem it against those selected product during check out the items are always unavailable and you can never get it. I will advise people to not to trust this app. I order after sometime and again the same delayed service. Nothing has improved. Unworthy

I rarely or never review and rate any app yet blinkit has done something generously that i appreciate.. Explanation : It was my second time buying whey protein from blinkit and as i previously bought it from them this time they gave me a discount of ₹129 which i really appreciate. but the most crazy part is that the discount was labelled as Protein paglu 😂..!! also the pricing too is competative and fair by the value they provide.. Thanks for making my night..! (I ordered at night 😅)

Good experience with Blinkit ,The delivery was quick, and most items were fresh and well-packed. The app is easy to use, and it saves a lot of time. I'm giving 4 stars because sometimes a few products are out of stock or substitutions aren't ideal. Overall, a reliable and convenient service ! ,

I had a very disappointing experience with Blinkit. My NEV rechargeable frother stopped working within 2–3 days. Blinkit Support asked me to return to my original delivery location to request a replacement, which I did. However, the app no longer allowed me to raise the issue or contact an agent. Despite emailing support with proof, videos, and a call recording, I received no response. The warranty support process needs significant improvement

Blinkit has been amazing for me since 2022. I always tip the delivery partners and sometimes some of them say they don't get the tip if added within the app but when I ask them to open their earnings history, it shows up there. Can you guys please add a notification or a highlight next to each order saying this order has a tip amount? Or atleast a notification for the delivery guys where they get immediately notified once they complete an order which had tips added? This would be really helpful

why is aurge charge even there its not like they prioritize orders if you pay extra. Also they really need to put some cheaper options of items available in the market most of the time i have to buy the most expensive version of that particular item. Also delivery drivers almost never follow orders and why do they have to call everytime even though i gave my address deliver there not on my phone and just ring the bell of house.

i usually don't review any app or website but blinkit is genuinely a great app to order the groceries. what ever i want , is on this app . it really reduced my burden a lot because before blinkit I used to go a long way to the market by myself but now I can see the daily uses on my doorstep just due to blinkit. Dilivery is just soo fast , employee's behaviour is great and the quality of food and goods are brilliant . so for me blinkit is the best app I've ever seen.

Horrible app. 10 minutes they say..I was running late for work and I had an essential to be delivered to me in 10-15 minutes...My order got delayed...delayed by 30 minutes. What should I make out of this?? Enable Cash on delivery so I can cancel this pathetic order.

10th. July. Getting dissatisfied. It shows 8 mins to deliver while ordering, once the order is placed it skips to 18mins. So actually it will be delivered in 20-25 mins in real time. Is it time to look out for new options? Been using the app for years now. But currently facing problem as the delivery person is being shown some other route to my residence on map. Please look into the matter as it's an inconvenience to both the delivery person & customer.
